product.name: Spectrum Diversified Euro Utensil Holder, Satin Nickel
product.description: Keep a fresh assortment of your favorite produce, baked goods or pre-packaged snacks in one convenient place with Spectrum's Grid Arched 2-Tier Server. Two open bowls allow fruits and vegetables to ripen evenly and naturally, while offering quick and easy access to stored items. Made from sturdy, durable steel, this fruit holder is made to last and built for the long haul. The simple and natural lines of the Grid collection will add a clean, fresh look to your kitchen table or dining room aesthetic.
features: NEUTRAL TONE: Finished in a neutral tone, it's easy to blend this fruit, produce, and vegetable tiered basket with nearly any aesthetic you may already have.
STURDY DESIGN: Made from sturdy steel, this fruit and produce server is durable and made to last, organizing your dining room, kitchen or countertop for years to come.
STORAGE SOLVED: No longer worry about having enough room in the fridge for your vegetables, fruit, or produce! With the Grid Arched 2-Tier Server, allow your fruit to ripen naturally and evenly!
EFFECTIVE AND RELIABLE: This storage fruit basket is effective at clearing counter and fridge space in the kitchen!
DIMENSIONS AND CARE: Measures 10.75" L x 10.25" W x 12.5" H. To clean, wipe with a damp cloth and towel dry.
